description: Bag specifications for constraint-aware packing optimization

personal.name: Personal Item
personal.description: Small bag that fits under the seat (backpack, purse, laptop bag)
personal.notes: Always with passenger, lowest loss risk, immediate access during flight

carry_on.name: Carry-On Bag
carry_on.description: Overhead bin roller bag or duffel
carry_on.notes: Overhead bin, accessible but limited during flight

checked.name: Checked Baggage
checked.description: Standard checked suitcase in cargo hold
checked.notes: Cargo hold - extreme temps (-40C to +50C), pressure changes, higher loss risk

carry_on_only.description: Traveling with carry-on and personal item only
carry_on_only.typical_use: Short trips (1-5 days), budget airlines, avoiding baggage fees

full_luggage.description: Full luggage set with checked bag
full_luggage.typical_use: Longer trips, international travel, bulky items needed
